entries.title: Monorepo inception — exxat-ds + studentUX submodules, workspace config
entries.what: Built the monorepo from scratch: exxat-ds and studentUX added as git submodules (read-only). Shared tsconfig.base.json with @exxat/ds/* and @exxat/student/* path aliases. pnpm-workspace.yaml, turbo.json. CLAUDE.md with full DS token table, component imports, and product map — loaded every session.
entries.why: Single source of truth for all Exxat product apps. DS submodules prevent divergence from the canonical design system. CLAUDE.md ensures every session starts with the same context.

entries.title: Exam Management scaffold — Admin + Student apps
entries.what: Scaffolded both apps from zero: Admin app (apps/exam-management/admin/) with sidebar, routes, DS imports. Student app (apps/exam-management/assessment-taker/) with assessment list, take-exam, and results pages. Both apps wired to Admin DS via @exxat/ds webpack alias.
entries.why: First product app in the monorepo. Established the pattern all other products follow: next.config.ts webpack alias, globals.css DS import, layout.tsx with Typekit + FA.

entries.title: Question Bank full redesign — new state shape, DS migration, folder tree
entries.what: Complete QB redesign: flattened folder tree, Saved/Draft status model (removed shortlisted), favorited questions, role-based filtering (My Questions default), DS Table migration (TableHeader/TableBody/TableRow/TableCell), sidebar search + DS DropdownMenu context menu, collaborator avatar stack, version history Popover, 14-column definition. Design spec written first.
entries.why: Original QB had raw HTML tables, non-DS buttons, and a state shape that couldn't support multi-folder questions or role-based views. Redesign aligned with Aarti's PRD §3 requirements.

entries.title: Assessment Builder + Courses page + QB column drag-reorder
entries.what: Assessment Builder: split layout, smart views, question picker, difficulty distribution chart, mini bars. Courses page: expandable table — course rows, offering rows, student counts. QB: column drag-reorder via HTML5 drag events, column header context menus (pin/hide/inline enum), subfolder folder mutations (rename, create inline, move, delete with impact popup), 5-level mock data.
entries.why: Assessment Builder is the core workflow connecting QB to assessments. Courses page is the entry point for faculty. Column drag-reorder was a direct Aarti directive.

entries.title: Governance layer — DS updates watcher, subagent telemetry, hooks cascade-check
entries.what: ds-updates watcher (Tier 2 swap-ready architecture): scans DS submodule deltas, maps to product code. Subagent telemetry wired to architect-input.py. Hooks: cascade-check on fix/redesign prompts closes Pattern B (sibling coverage). claude-updates watcher auto-invoked on session start. Appearances toggle (theme switcher) shipped in PCE + exam-management admin.
entries.why: DS submodule updates were silently breaking product code. Subagent telemetry enables the architect agent to propose rules based on evidence. Appearances toggle: Aarti needs to preview both Exxat One and Prism branding.

entries.title: QB multi-column sort, sidebar polish, WCAG 400% zoom compliance
entries.what: Multi-column sort (Item 8). Sidebar: Active/Inactive course grouping, ancestor path in hover popover, deep subfolder mock data. WCAG 400% zoom: toolbar layout reflow, sticky positioning fix, title consolidation — all WCAG 1.4.10 Reflow compliant. 200% zoom compact title bar.
entries.why: WCAG 400% compliance is non-negotiable for government/healthcare contracts. Multi-column sort was a backlog item from Aarti's May 7 session.

entries.title: QB question actions — archive/restore/copy, bulk bar, status filter, folder pin
entries.what: Question actions: archive, restore, copy to/remove from/multi-location. Bulk action bar: compact icon-only folder actions with tooltips, Radix nested-modal conflict resolved. Status filter with counts. All Questions location. Folder pin (thumbtack). Lock icon for private folders. Role-based access: exam admin gets institution-wide folder visibility including private.
entries.why: Archive/restore/copy were the last PRD §4.6 gaps. Bulk bar enables faculty to manage large question sets efficiently. Lock icons surface visibility rules without a tooltip.

entries.title: QB completion — full-text search, toast + undo, row actions pill, location lock icons
entries.what: Full-text search across all question fields. Dark action toast with progress bar, undo, and folder link — on all actions. Row actions pill. Location lock icons (private folder indicator). Pinned section in sidebar below search. Context-aware toast copy per action type.
entries.why: Full-text search was the last major missing QB feature. Toast+undo pattern matches PRD §4.6 reversibility requirement. Sidebar pinned section surfaced most-used folders.

entries.title: Exxat Prism Portal — workspace hub with all 6 products
entries.what: Built apps/portal/ from zero: AppSidebar (Prism wordmark, Apps nav, RS footer), SiteHeader with SidebarTrigger, WorkspacePage with product card grid, ProductCard with Open Admin button + ⋯ dropdown. 4 layout variants: Gradient / Bento / Dark / Rows. Per-product SVG illustrations. Adobe-style card variant. Connector list + App Store detail page. Deployed to Vercel at port 3100.
entries.why: Single entry point to all Exxat products. Romit and Arun need a launcher that looks production-ready for stakeholder demos. Prism theme aligns with the new brand direction.

entries.title: BUILD-STATUS.md — session continuity reference for all apps
entries.what: Created docs/BUILD-STATUS.md: per-product build status (what's built, what's not done yet, what's blocked) so every new session starts with accurate context without reading code. Covers Exam Management, PCE, Portal, and planned products.
entries.why: Context compaction was causing sessions to start cold — not knowing what was already built and what was in-progress. BUILD-STATUS.md is the first thing a new session reads.

entries.title: PRD Watcher — daily SharePoint sync with auto-apply + flag
entries.what: Scheduled agent (prd-watcher-daily, 9am EDT) reads Monil's PCE PRD and Nipun's Exam Mgmt roadmap + PRD via M365 MCP. Diffs against snapshots. Applies clear changes to code; flags ambiguous ones to docs/watch/flags/. Registry at docs/watch/registry.json. 4 docs registered.
entries.why: Prevent design drift — when Monil or Nipun updates a PRD, code should reflect it by next morning without Romit having to prompt.

entries.title: Compliance sweep — weekly FERPA/HIPAA/WCAG audit across all product TSX
entries.what: Scheduled agent (compliance-sweep-weekly, Mon 8am EDT) greps all product TSX files for 12 rule violations: FERPA student-ID coexistence, WCAG opacity-60-on-text, missing aria-hidden on FA icons, raw table usage, toast usage, missing DataTable empty state, and more. Writes violation-inventory.json and compliance-report.md. P1/P2/P3 severity with consequence language.
entries.why: FERPA violation = $43K–$274K fine per incident. WCAG failures block government contracts. Audit must run automatically — not only when Romit notices a problem.

entries.title: PCE + Exam Management UI patterns docs — session-start governance references
entries.what: apps/pce/docs/patterns/pce-ui-patterns.md (329 lines) and apps/exam-management/docs/patterns/ui-patterns.md (529 lines): page shell anatomy, DataTable conventions, interaction patterns, empty state formula, DS component map, token conventions, WCAG 2.1 AA checklist, FERPA §99.31, HIPAA §164.514. Auto-loaded at session start via CLAUDE.md.
entries.why: Without these docs, every session re-discovers the same violations — wrong DataTable pattern, raw buttons, missing aria-hidden. Loading them at start eliminates the correction loop.

entries.title: Doc Watcher UI — paste SharePoint links, validate duplicates, registry management
entries.what: Next.js app at tools/doc-watcher/ (localhost:3002, deployed to Vercel). Registry page: paste one or many SharePoint URLs, Check Links validates duplicates, Add prompts for product + label. Updates page: filterable feed of all architecture changes, PRD updates, compliance findings — grouped by date, P1 entries red-bordered. GitHub API backend — no database.
entries.why: Romit needed a simple interface to register new docs without editing JSON by hand. Also a cross-reference surface to show stakeholders (Arun, Nipun, Monil) what changed and why.

entries.title: DS snapshot — 44-component API surface, eliminates per-session DS source reads
entries.what: Python script (scripts/build_ds_snapshot.py) reads exxat-ds/packages/ui/src/, extracts variants, sizes, and key props via regex into docs/watch/ds-snapshot.json (44 components). Compliance-reviewer now reads snapshot in Step 0 instead of full source files. Daily refresh agent (ds-snapshot-refresh, 10am EDT).
entries.why: Reading full DS source per session cost ~4K tokens/component. Snapshot reduces it to ~50 tokens/grep — 80× reduction in DS lookup cost per session.

entries.title: Stakeholder decision cache — 6 PCE decisions + weekly Granola transcript extraction
entries.what: docs/watch/stakeholder-decisions.json seeded with 6 confirmed PCE PRD decisions (Monil): program-level scope, clinical CE focus, anonymous responses, N=5 threshold, 1-5 Likert enforced, 7-year retention. PRD watcher Step 6 extracts new decisions on every sync. Granola intake agent (Mon 9am EDT) pulls 7-day raw transcripts and extracts Aarti/Vishaka directives.
entries.why: Eliminates re-reading PRDs + transcripts every session to answer 'what did Aarti confirm about X'. Queryable JSON, transcript-level granularity — not synthesised summaries.

entries.title: Transcript→PRD diff — weekly P1 flag when Aarti directive contradicts PRD
entries.what: Scheduled agent (transcript-prd-diff-weekly, Tue 9am EDT) reads 14 days of Granola transcripts, extracts directives from Aarti/Adi/Vishaka, cross-references against PRD snapshots. Any contradiction flagged P1 with exact transcript quote + contradicting PRD text side by side.
entries.why: The cohort-filter incident: Aarti's 'no filters' directive was in the raw transcript but not in the summary — a filter was built and removed after two verification cycles. This agent catches that error class automatically.

entries.title: BUILD-STATUS auto-sync from Nipun's Excel roadmap
entries.what: PRD watcher Steps 7a–7f: when exam-roadmap-nipun Excel is processed, extract project status grid, map Excel status values (Completed→🟢 Shipped, In Progress→🟡 In Progress, Not Started→⚪ Not started), update docs/BUILD-STATUS.md Exam Management section inline. No manual updates needed.
entries.why: BUILD-STATUS.md was going stale — Nipun marks items complete in Excel but the doc required a manual update. Now syncs every morning.

entries.title: BUILD-STATUS updated from Nipun roadmap Excel
entries.what: Added feature status table to Exam Management section: Create and Manage Question Bank → 🟢 Shipped, My Questions & All Questions → 🟢 Shipped, Assessment Creation → 🟡 In Progress, In Assessment Experience → 🟡 In Progress, Course Offering Perspective → 🟡 In Progress, Question Creation (Manual & AI) → 🟡 In Progress, Question Tagging/Import → 🟡 In Progress, Assessment Distribution → 🟡 In Progress, Dashboard → 🟡 In Progress. PCE quick-orientation status updated to 🟡 In Progress — target 30 Aug 2026. Last updated date bumped to 2026-05-19.
entries.why: Nipun's roadmap Excel synced for first time — status values applied to BUILD-STATUS.md. PCE Phase 1 target date (30 Aug 2026) confirmed from Monil's PRD.

entries.title: BUILD-STATUS updated from Nipun roadmap Excel
entries.what: Added two new feature rows: 'Setup — Logo, LMS integration, RBAC, Import Courses' → 🟡 In Progress; 'Base entities — Faculty, Students' → 🟡 In Progress. Last updated date bumped to 2026-05-23.
entries.why: Nipun's roadmap Excel updated — two new work items appeared that were not previously tracked in BUILD-STATUS.

entries.title: PCE PRD — Distribute Survey wizard steps now defined (5-step structure)
entries.what: Step 2 Distribute Survey now has explicit 5-step wizard: Properties/Details, Distribution, Survey Design, Communication, Report Access.
entries.why: CLEAR design decision — this will drive the wizard step structure in the PCE admin app when Distribute Survey is built.

entries.title: PCE PRD — Shared Platform Architecture section added under Analytics
entries.what: New section: Shared Platform Architecture (Between PCE and General Surveys): Survey type, Template engine, Distribution engine, Analytics foundation.
entries.why: AMBIGUOUS — implications for whether PCE and General Surveys share data models or just UI patterns. Needs clarification from Monil.

entries.title: PCE PRD — Limitation of Current Survey Capability section added
entries.what: New section documenting 3 limitations of current Exxat Surveys: no bulk push, auto-render sections, access control within form.
entries.why: Non-functional context addition explaining redesign rationale. No code action needed.

entries.title: PCE PRD — Dependency renamed: SIS/course roster → SIS/LMS
entries.what: Dependencies table: 'SIS/course roster integration' renamed to 'SIS/LMS'; risk text changed from 'Surveys cannot auto-trigger; manual workaround required for Phase 1' to 'Survey distribution cannot be automated'.
entries.why: CLEAR — scope of dependency broadened. Informational.

entries.title: Exam Roadmap — 'Question bank on screen analytics' removed from Excel
entries.what: Feature that was previously listed as TBD is no longer present in Nipun's Excel. Never reached BUILD-STATUS (was TBD → skipped).
entries.why: CLEAR removal — possible descope or deferral. Confirm with Nipun.

entries.title: Exam Roadmap — Stakeholder Alignment column added; Question Creation has open alignment points
entries.what: New 'Stakeholder Allignment' column in Excel. Question creation (Manual & AI) marked with 'Alignment Points' — suggests open stakeholder disagreements.
entries.why: AMBIGUOUS — unknown what alignment gaps exist for Question Creation.

entries.title: PCE PRD — Decision extracted: Survey/CE co-existence redesign approach (pce-decision-007)
entries.what: New decision: The overall approach is to re-design Surveys so that Course Evaluation and Survey can co-exist.

entries.title: PCE PRD — Decision extracted: Three new constructs (pce-decision-008)
entries.what: New decision: Introduce Survey type, Course type, and Subject as three new constructs to enable CE distribution.

entries.title: PCE PRD — Decision extracted: Track submission only, not responses (pce-decision-009) — FERPA implication
entries.what: New decision: Track submission only, not response content. FERPA implication: student responses must remain untraceable.

entries.title: __updates() dev console — daily PRD + compliance feed in browser DevTools
entries.what: window.__updates() registered in both pce and exam-management admin apps. Auto-prints P1/prd-change summary on page load (dev only, tree-shaken in prod). Supports filters: __updates('today'), __updates('pce'), __updates('corrections'), __updates('p1'), __updates('week').
entries.why: Romit can cross-reference design decisions in the browser while building — see what changed today without switching tabs. Zero product UI pollution.

entries.title: Granola intake — 8 new PCE decisions from May 19 transcripts
entries.what: Extracted 8 confirmed PCE design decisions from two May 19 meeting transcripts (Course evaluation and survey design — base entities, template workflow, and ETAs; Post-course evaluation template — workflow, role-based access, and distribution setup with Monel). Decisions cover: FERPA scope for student feedback, subject population from Prism course-level roles, conditional section rendering, course-association requirement for distribution, no predefined templates in phase 1, distribution filters (term + academic year required, cohort optional), template auto-assignment by course type, and guest lecturer evaluation deferred to general survey. Added as pce-decision-010 through pce-decision-017.
entries.source: Course evaluation and survey design — base entities, template workflow, and ETAs transcript — May 19, 2026; Post-course evaluation template — workflow, role-based access, and distribution setup with Monel transcript — May 19, 2026

entries.title: PCE survey status labels updated to match PRD formal status table
entries.what: Updated 4 status labels across 3 files to match the new formal 'Status of a Survey' table added to PCE PRD §4: active→'Scheduled', collecting→'Live', pending_review→'Closed, Pending Review', released→'Closed, Results Available'.
entries.why: PCE PRD §4 now formally defines the survey lifecycle with specific status labels. The prior labels (Active, Collecting, Pending Review, Shared with Faculty) were informal and inconsistent with the PRD-defined terminology.
entries.source: PCE PRD §4 Key User Flows — Status of a Survey table (Monil Pokar, updated 12 May 2026)

entries.title: PCE PRD — New Section 13 'Feedback on Designs' with open layout questions
entries.what: New section added with open design questions about CE vs General Survey positioning, sidebar navigation structure (moderation may move into survey status), and FAAS UI constraint for question creation.
entries.why: AMBIGUOUS — contains open questions ('?') and partially resolved items. Sidebar restructure implied but not confirmed.

entries.title: PCE PRD — Wizard Step 2 renamed 'Create Survey'; substep 2 renamed 'Distribution' → 'Scope/Courses'
entries.what: Section heading changed from 'Distribute Survey' to 'Create Survey'. Wizard substep 2 changed from 'Distribution' to 'Scope/Courses'. Communication and Report Access steps marked as '(newly added)'.
entries.why: CLEAR rename — no code change needed (code already uses CreateSurvey terminology). Step label to use when building wizard.

entries.title: PCE PRD — Template Creation step order changed: name/description now before course type
entries.what: Template Creation wizard step order reversed: name/description input now comes first, course type (Didactic/Clinical) second. Previously course type was the first field.
entries.why: CLEAR UX reorder — affects field ordering in the template creation wizard when built.
entries.source: PCE PRD §4 Key User Flows — Step 1 Template Creation

entries.title: PCE PRD — Shared Platform Architecture: concrete capability list replaced by external doc placeholder
entries.what: The 4-item list (Survey type, Template engine, Distribution engine, Analytics foundation) was removed from PRD body and replaced with a link/placeholder labelled 'Shared Capabilties - PCE and Gen Surveys'.
entries.why: AMBIGUOUS — architectural detail no longer visible in PRD text. Likely moved to a separate architecture document. Implications for whether PCE and General Surveys share APIs/DB tables are unclear.

entries.title: PCE PRD — User Stories table: Results Review and Longitudinal Insights merged into single Analytics row
entries.what: Two faculty-facing user story rows ('Results Review' and 'Longitudinal Insights') were removed and replaced with a single 'Analytics' row. Linked document also renamed from 'US-Push Survey' to 'US-Create Survey'.
entries.why: CLEAR informational change. No code action needed.

entries.title: Exam Roadmap — Excel columns restructured: 'Requirement Readiness' removed, 'Product/QA/UAT/Release' columns added
entries.what: The Excel tracker now shows Product, QA/UAT, and Release column headers where 'Requirement Readiness / In progress' previously appeared. No feature status values changed. New columns appear unpopulated.
entries.why: AMBIGUOUS — structural pipeline change in Nipun's tracker. New columns likely represent QA and release stages not previously tracked.

entries.title: Granola intake — 13 new Exam Management decisions from May 19–22 transcripts
entries.what: Extracted 13 confirmed Exam Management design decisions from four transcripts (Assessment creation workflows and question bank design — May 19; Question bank design — move/copy options — May 20; Assessment PRD — accessibility standards, offline exam download, and parity with ExamSoft — May 21; Assessment question design — AI features, scoring, and workflow — May 22). Decisions cover: offline exam download in scope, question bank at base course level, question-level review deferred 1+ year, no standalone assessments in phase 1 UI, three roles (Admin/Coordinator/Collaborator), review separate from results access, assignments deprioritized, AI tagging always runs with manual override precedence, rationale stored at QB level, option position randomization as ExamSoft parity, 4 assessment creation methods (copy/AI/import/manual), phase 1 accessibility targets (200% zoom, text-to-speech, dyslexic font, high contrast), and point-by-serial as text not bar. Added as exam-decision-001 through exam-decision-013.
entries.source: Assessment creation workflows and question bank design transcript — May 19, 2026; Question bank design — move/copy options, design system alignment, and setup entities transcript — May 20, 2026; Assessment PRD — accessibility standards, offline exam download, and parity with ExamSoft transcript — May 21, 2026; Assessment question design — AI features, scoring, and workflow transcript — May 22, 2026

entries.title: PCE PRD — Key Product Decision 2: PRISM dependency sub-bullets added (AMBIGUOUS)
entries.what: Decision 2 gained two sub-bullets: (a) Dependency on availability of course offerings in PRISM-base; (b) This will not work for schools that don't have term and course data in PRISM.
entries.why: Contains 'Dependency on' — AMBIGUOUS. Reveals that CE distribution is blocked for non-Prism schools. No fallback path defined.

entries.title: PCE PRD — New Flow 2b: AI Native / Run Evaluation flow added
entries.what: Entire new section describing an AI-native evaluate distribution flow: admin email trigger, Run Evaluation page, Leo agent panel with animated orb, per-course audit (flags missing faculty/students/dates), survey window confirmation, course tiles with Ready/Fix states, conditional Push Surveys activation.
entries.why: Major new feature scope. Non-functional scope addition — no code action applied. May supersede or complement the 5-step wizard (Flow 2a) previously flagged.
entries.source: PCE PRD §4 Key User Flows — Flow 2b

entries.title: PCE PRD — Step 3: Instructor section renders per instructor count
entries.what: Step 3 Response Collection clarified: the Instructor section renders N times based on the number of instructors assigned to the course.
entries.why: CLEAR behavioral clarification — non-functional. No code action applied.
entries.source: PCE PRD §4 Key User Flows — Step 3 Response Collection

entries.title: PCE PRD — Step 3: Submitted surveys remain visible to students in Submitted state
entries.what: Step 3 clarified: after submission, the survey remains visible to the student with Submitted state shown (not hidden/removed from student portal).
entries.why: CLEAR behavioral addition. Student-facing display change — no code action applied (student app not yet built).
entries.source: PCE PRD §4 Key User Flows — Step 3 Response Collection

entries.title: BUILD-STATUS last updated date bumped to 2026-06-02
entries.what: No feature statuses changed in this run (no step 7b mapping match — Excel uses Aligned/Review Pending in Business column, not Completed/In Progress). Last updated date updated to today.
entries.why: Nipun's roadmap Excel synced — business alignment confirmed for Assessment Creation & Distribution and In Assessment Experience. Engineering blocked on In Assessment Experience (flagged separately).

entries.title: Exam Roadmap — New Capability/User Story table with P0/P1/P2 priorities and ownership
entries.what: Brand new sheet/section added to Nipun's Excel. Breaks down top-level features into user-story-level capabilities with P0-Cohere / P1-Jan 20 / P2 priorities. Course Offering has 7 sub-capabilities all 'In Review' (Vishal). In Assessment Experience: exam initiation and post-exam completion 'To be picked', test taking experience 'Completed'. Smart search for questions 'In Progress' (Bhargav). Question Tagging: 🟡 In Progress (Vishal). Exam grading: 'To be picked' (Bhargav). Assessment Creation sub-items defined but mostly no status yet.
entries.why: AMBIGUOUS — new structural tracking section may supersede or complement the old Project Status grid. 'In Review' for Course Offering sub-items and 'To be picked' for exam initiation/post-exam suggest grooming is imminent.

entries.title: Exam Roadmap — 8 open alignment questions with 04-Jun-26 target dates (all past due)
entries.what: New Open Questions section added with 8 unresolved questions: (1) Are User roles defined in code? (Engg/Darshan), (2) Build a review flow? (CX), (3) Accommodations at exam/course/student level? (CX), (4) Who decides publishing date? (CX), (5) Who can see student performance? (CX — note: Admin gives access), (6) Teaching assistant role capability (CX), (7) When to show planned exams to students? (CX), (8) Should student experience support external hardware? (CX). All targeted 04-Jun-26.
entries.why: AMBIGUOUS — open questions, all due yesterday (2026-06-05). Questions 3 and 5 have FERPA-adjacent implications (student performance visibility, accommodations).

entries.title: Exam Roadmap — AI-Assisted Blueprint Creation added to 2027 roadmap
entries.what: New item 'AI-Assisted Blueprint Creation' added to the 2027 phase of the Phase-wise Roadmap by Workflow. Was not in the prior snapshot. Sits alongside transmit grades to LMS, Advanced question level metrics, and Offline exam taking.
entries.why: CLEAR — new 2027 feature. Not yet in BUILD-STATUS (2027 scope). Likely refers to AI-generated assessment blueprints (Bloom's distribution across a course's assessment plan).

entries.title: Exam Roadmap — Course Offering Engineering: Not Started → In Development (Darshan, 12-Jun); Design: In Refinement (Romit)
entries.what: Course Offering design status changed from '🟡 In Review (May 20 wireframes v1)' to 'In Refinement (Romit)' with 20-May to 9-Jun window. Engineering changed from '⚪ Not Started' to 'In Development (Darshan)' with target 12-Jun. 7 Course Offering sub-capabilities all P0-Cohere and 'In Review'.
entries.why: CLEAR status change — engineering has begun on Course Offering. 12-Jun target means design must be finalized this week. BUILD-STATUS already shows 🟡 In Progress — no change needed to status label.

entries.title: BUILD-STATUS last updated date bumped to 2026-06-05
entries.what: No feature statuses changed in step 7b mapping (no 'Completed'/'Not Started'/etc. matches for top-level BUILD-STATUS features). Excel now has Gantt chart section (As-of: 2026-06-05), new Capability/User Story table, and open questions. Last updated date bumped to 2026-06-05.
entries.why: Nipun's roadmap Excel synced — structural changes detected (new Capability table, Gantt chart, open questions). No step-7b-mappable status changes for top-level features. PCE Phase 1 target (30 Aug 2026) remains future — BUILD-STATUS PCE row unchanged.

entries.title: BUILD-STATUS last updated date bumped to 2026-06-06
entries.what: No feature statuses changed in step 7b mapping (Excel content unchanged from 2026-06-05 snapshot). Last updated date updated to today.
entries.why: Nipun's roadmap Excel synced — no status changes detected. PCE Phase 1 target (30 Aug 2026) remains future — BUILD-STATUS PCE row unchanged.

entries.title: BUILD-STATUS last updated date bumped to 2026-06-07
entries.what: No feature statuses changed in step 7b mapping (Excel content unchanged from 2026-06-06 snapshot). Last updated date updated to today.
entries.why: Nipun's roadmap Excel synced — no status changes detected. Gantt chart As-of date still 2026-06-05. All 8 open questions (due 04-Jun-26) remain unresolved. PCE Phase 1 target (30 Aug 2026) remains future — BUILD-STATUS PCE row unchanged.

entries.title: Exam Roadmap — Manage Question Bank row now shows explicit P0 - Cohere priority
entries.what: Capability table: 'Manage Question Bank' row gained explicit priority label 'P0 - Cohere'. Previously the row had no priority column value. Status (Completed) and owner (Nipun) unchanged.
entries.why: Nipun's roadmap Excel updated — P0-Cohere priority tag applied to Manage Question Bank capability row. CLEAR informational tracker update; no code change required (feature already shipped).

entries.title: BUILD-STATUS last updated date bumped to 2026-06-08
entries.what: No feature statuses changed in step 7b mapping (only structural change was P0-Cohere priority added to Manage QB row — already Completed, no status change). Last updated date updated to today.
entries.why: Nipun's roadmap Excel synced — minor tracker update detected (P0 priority label on Manage QB). PCE Phase 1 target (30 Aug 2026) remains future — BUILD-STATUS PCE row unchanged.

entries.title: Exam Roadmap — Business alignment confirmed for 2 features; In Assessment Experience engineering blocked
entries.what: Assessment Creation & Distribution and In Assessment Experience business alignment changed from Review Pending to Aligned. In Assessment Experience engineering now shows 🔴 Blocked (comment: 'To continue on 4th June post design unblock'). 15th June delivery targets added for QB (QA) and Assessment Creation & Distribution.
entries.why: CLEAR alignment update. Blocking status on In Assessment Experience is an urgent signal. No BUILD-STATUS feature status changes (no step 7b mapping match).

entries.title: PCE PRD §13a.4 — Move search bar to top (design feedback, non-functional)
entries.what: Monil added §13a item 4: 'Move the search bar to the top'. Applies to the surveys master list page.
entries.why: CLEAR design directive from Monil's review of the prototype. Non-functional feedback — flag only, no code auto-applied.
entries.source: PCE PRD §13a Feedback on Designs — General Layout

entries.title: PCE PRD §13a.5 — User profile position questioned (AMBIGUOUS — contains '?')
entries.what: Monil added §13a item 5: 'The user profile is supposed to be on the top right, any reason on why are we moving it to left bottom?' questioning current sidebar-footer user badge placement.
entries.why: AMBIGUOUS — sentence contains '?' inside design feedback section. Monil is questioning the current DS Sidebar footer slot usage for user profile.
entries.source: PCE PRD §13a Feedback on Designs — General Layout

entries.title: PCE PRD §13b.1 — No copy option for templates (CLEAR scope restriction)
entries.what: Monil added §13b item 1: 'Do-not give option for user to copy existing template. They can just create template from scratch in course Evaluation.' Template creation UI not yet built — no code change applied.
entries.why: CLEAR product scope restriction from design review. Template creation must start from scratch only for Course Evaluation. Flag only — no existing code to remove.
entries.source: PCE PRD §13b Feedback on Designs — Create Template

entries.title: PCE PRD §13b.3 — 'Add course type as an input' confirms §4 requirement
entries.what: Monil added §13b item 3: 'Add course type as an input' as design review confirmation that the Course Type (Didactic/Clinical) field must be visible in the template builder.
entries.why: CLEAR — confirms §4 requirement (User selects Course type: Didactic or Clinical, optional). Not a new requirement; a design review reminder to make the field explicitly visible.
entries.source: PCE PRD §13b Feedback on Designs — Create Template

entries.title: PCE PRD §13c.1 — Push survey wizard steps should be horizontal
entries.what: Monil added §13c item 1: 'Wouldn't the steps of a push survey look good if they are horizontal. With this, user gets more real estate on the screen.' Applies to the Create Survey wizard stepper layout.
entries.why: CLEAR UX layout direction. Wizard not yet built in PCE app — flag for when it is. Horizontal stepper recommended over vertical/left-rail.
entries.source: PCE PRD §13c Feedback on Designs — Create Surveys

entries.title: PCE PRD §13c.2 — 'No Report Access step for CE' conflicts with §4 (AMBIGUOUS)

entries.why: AMBIGUOUS — 'do not need' follows 'will not be covered' scope-exclusion pattern. Directly contradicts the formal §4 requirements which list Report Access as step 5. Must be resolved before building the wizard.
entries.source: PCE PRD §13c Feedback on Designs — Create Surveys vs §4 Key User Flows

entries.title: PCE PRD — Course type taxonomy renamed: Didactic/Clinical → Practice/Classroom/Lab
entries.what: §2 Key Decision #5 course type values changed from Didactic/Clinical (2 types) to Practice/Classroom/Lab (3 new types). Code updated: pce-mock-data.ts type union updated to 'practice' | 'classroom' | 'lab'; all 'didactic' values → 'classroom'; all 'clinical' values → 'practice'. analytics/page.tsx CourseTypeFilter type and ToggleGroupItems updated to match (All/Classroom/Practice/Lab).
entries.why: Monil updated PRD §2 Key Decision #5 on 14 Jun 2026. Course taxonomy now uses setting-based names (Practice, Classroom, Lab) rather than instructional method names (Didactic, Clinical). CLEAR rename — applied directly.
entries.source: PCE PRD §2 Key Product Decisions #5 (Monil Pokar, updated 14 June 2026)

entries.title: Granola intake — 17 new PCE decisions + 1 exam decision from Jun 9–10 transcripts
entries.what: Extracted 18 confirmed design decisions from 4 meeting transcripts (Post-Course Survey Cadence Meeting BiWeekly Jun 9; Exam Management Sync up Jun 9; Course and faculty evaluation setup Jun 10; India discussion — Weekly Product Sync Jun 10). PCE decisions cover: 3 CE results entry points (term/faculty/course), directory pages view-only with Prism deep-links, student email-only distribution (no login), 2 email templates with term-anchored reminder schedule, academic year/term dates as mandatory prerequisite, term-grouped dashboard, 2 longitudinal analytics sidebar entry points (Faculty leaderboard + Course history), 3-category template section structure (Course/Faculty/General with multi-select roles), faculty results must not be visible to other faculty, template creation paths (Build new sub-options: manual or PDF/Word import; top-level document import, not per-section), multi-select section adding with labels only, Prism-only distribution channel, anonymous response non-configurable default (visibility toggle removed), comment moderation stretch goal (results release date mandatory if excluded), parent+child date override for bulk distribution, report access screen removed (role-based access only), general survey UI unchanged. Exam decision: course offering page limited to currently available data only. 1 conflict flagged (copy existing template), 1 decision superseded (pce-decision-014 → pce-decision-028). Added as pce-decision-019 through pce-decision-035 and exam-decision-014.
entries.source: Post-Course Survey Cadence Meeting (BiWeely 45 Mins) transcript — Jun 9, 2026; Exam Management Sync up transcript — Jun 9, 2026; Course and faculty evaluation setup — directories, templates, and term workflow transcript — Jun 10, 2026; India discussion — Weekly Product Sync | New Initiatives (Prism) transcript — Jun 10, 2026
